item.title: About me
item.description: Work in progress (2022-10). I’m Matěj [/ˈmatɛj/] Hejda. Originally from Czech Republic, I’m currently living in Glasgow, Scotland. My interdisciplinary research (on which I am focusing during my PhD) lies at the interesction of physics, photonics, nanotechnology and computer science. The main research goal of the group lies in demonstration of brain-inspired (also called neuromorphic) dynamics and behaviours in photonic and nanophotonic devices, with the goal of creating fundamental building blocks for light-powered on-chip artifical neural networks.

item.title: Useful Code Snippets
item.description: Some snippets of code that might come in handy to others.

item.title: The Murals of Glasgow (ultimate list)
item.description: Street art and street murals are becoming a staple feature of many different cities around the globe - including Glasgow, the largest Scottish city. Colourful artistic paintings of various sizes can be found all around the city, and there’s even an official mural trail to help you discover them. There’s just one small issue with the officia trail: there’s many more really nice murals than what is included in the trail (and new murals keep popping up).
